summary: Game Tile Live FGotD Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is turned ON
AND a Live FGotD game is on the schedule
AND the user is on the Home page

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to a Live Free Game of the Day game in the Hero
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "<away_team> at <home_team>, Live, Free Game of the Day. Press select to play game. Press up for the main menu. Move down to browse more content."
